title: picralima nitida
intro: Picralima nitida, also known as Prekese or Yoruba, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. It is a climbing vine native to the tropical regions of West Africa. The medicinal properties of Picralima nitida include its ability to be used as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic. The health benefits of the plant include the prevention of kidney stones, treatment of fever, and relief from menstrual cramps, among others, and it can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture.
